title: When you realize that you’re the senior dev now.
summary: A Google for Developers video featuring Pete King that presents a humorous or motivational take on realizing one's advancement to senior developer status. The piece suggests that career growth sometimes happens unexpectedly.
writeup: This Google for Developers short features Pete King with a humorous, motivational framing of the moment a developer recognizes having reached senior status. The central point is that career growth can arrive unexpectedly rather than through a single deliberate milestone.
